outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility regime. Positive total GEX (0.01B+0.02B) indicates dealers long gamma, suppressing price swings and stabilizing upward momentum.
outlook.summary: Extremely bullish positioning with spot 10.8% above structural gamma flip zone. PCR ratios near 0.03-0.04 signal aggressive call accumulation with minimal hedging. Reverse smirk skew in monthly confirms call demand dominance. All visible strikes are ITM calls below spot, creating magnetic pull zones during pullbacks. No visible overhead resistance in dataset suggests open upside path.

levels.motivazione: Structural equilibrium across ALL expiries (0DTE: 5795, Weekly: 5800, Monthly: 5800). Max Pain alignment creates powerful support. Dealers transition from short to long gamma here.
Peak weekly call OI (305 contracts). Dealer pin risk zone below spot. High concentration creates magnetic attraction during consolidations.
Secondary weekly call OI cluster (244 contracts). Combined with 6370 (162 OI) forms resistance band for pullback targets.
Dominant monthly call OI (208 contracts). Medium-term structural reference with high dealer gamma exposure.
Peak 0DTE call OI (80 contracts). Intraday pin zone for gamma hedging flows. Volume/OI ratio suggests active positioning.
